caption: A man with grey hair and glasses stands behind a wooden podium, speaking into a black microphone. He wears a light-blue, button-down shirt with an eagle pattern and a decorative necklace. He is positioned in front of a background of light-brown horizontal blinds. In the bottom-right of each scene, the word "ORCA" appears in white capital letters. Across the sequence, the man transitions from smiling and looking toward the side to focusing downward on the podium. He adjusts his position slightly as he speaks, with his hands resting near a document on the podium. To the sides and bottom of the frame, the tops of heads of other people are partially visible, suggesting he is addressing an audience.
